stemHtml: The height of the friction layer is the largest under the following conditions:

options.a: Rough terrain, high wind speed, unstable air, during a warm summer afternoon.
options.b: Rough terrain, high wind speed, unstable air, during a warm summer morning.
options.c: Flat terrain, low wind speed, unstable air, during a warm summer afternoon.
options.d: Flat terrain, high wind speed, stable air, during a warm summer morning.
